change_details: Continue along the weight_decay direction: 2e-4 → 3e-4 under ent=0.008. The jump from 1e-4→2e-4 produced a clean improvement on the primary goal metric (im_min 0.46→0.23). Probing one step further on the same axis tests whether im continues to decrease monotonically or whether 2e-4 is already near the sweet spot. If 3e-4 improves further, we likely have monotonic win available on this axis; if it regresses, 2e-4 is near the peak and next move should be a different axis.
